title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: kdump-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for kdump-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: [RHEL-10][Azure] kdump fails to generate vmcore when reserve 192MB memory
Dumping vmcore to remote fs over OVS bridge network failed
[RHEL-10.1] Rebase kdump-utils to the latest upstream
Tune erofs image creating options to reduce kdump initramfs size
[RHEL-10] For VMs created from KVM Guest Image, kdump initramfs size are larger than normal.
nm-initrd-generator fails to create connections in RHEL 10 kdump initramfs (NVMe/TCP)

full_text:
An update for kdump-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
